-Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fstack-usage -O0 -g3 -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -T "/Users/kushvashishtha/gui_demo/STM32G491XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs
